title: Fire's Might Sword Overhaul
description: This projects completely removes the old sweeping animation for sword and replaces them with a fire with custom fire texture models. Leave reviews on my channel called VoidXP_2012. Btw, the icon is the wrong texture for the Netherite sword, but who cares?
body: This mod completely removes the old Minecraft sword and sweeping textures and replaces them with a fire version instead with the netherite version being completely on fire. Ask me to fix anything I will do it. Btw, gold is useless so I didn't make a texture for it
